text: Hello. Hello. Hey, good morning, James here from Nova Health Care, Missouri. I'm calling to let you know about a cashback benefit that may help with out-of-pocket expenses of up to $10,000, especially during a hospital stay. So to check whether you are eligible for this, may I know your age, please? 90. Sorry, you don't seem to qualify for the benefit plans I have. Have a good day!
